mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_library_attempt_answers (attempt_id, question_id, selected_option, correct_option, is_correct) VALUES (#{attemptId}, #{questionId}, #{selectedOption}, #{correctOption}, #{isCorrect})
mapper.select: SELECT id, attempt_id, question_id, selected_option, correct_option, is_correct, created_at FROM listening_library_attempt_answers WHERE attempt_id = #{attemptId}
